# Design Calculators - Master Engineering Tool Registry

## Project Overview
Design Calculators is a high-authority engineering suite providing standardized tools for Electrical, Mechanical, and Instrumentation design. All calculators are based on international standards (IEC, IEEE, API, ASME, ISA).

## Electrical Engineering
- [Arc Flash Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/arcflash.html): Evaluate arc flash hazards, incident energy, and determine required PPE categories (IEEE
                            1584).
- [Battery Sizing (AH)](https://designcalculators.co.in/battery-sizing.html): Calculate required Ampere-Hour capacity for UPS/DC systems based on load autonomy (IEEE 485).
- [Battery Life Estimator](https://designcalculators.co.in/batterylife.html): Estimate the remaining useful life of lead-acid batteries based on temperature and cycling.
- [Breaker Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/breaker-sizing.html): Select appropriate circuit breaker ratings (MCB/MCCB/ACB) based on load current and inrush.
- [Busbar Ampacity](https://designcalculators.co.in/busbarampacity.html): Determine current carrying capacity of copper and aluminum busbars with thermal derating.
- [Busbar Short Circuit](https://designcalculators.co.in/busbarshortcircuit.html): Calculate mechanical forces between busbars during short circuit fault conditions.
- [Cable Sizing Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/cable-sizing.html): Complete IEC 60364 sizing: Ampacity, Voltage Drop, and Short Circuit thermal withstand.
- [Cable Ampacity](https://designcalculators.co.in/cable-thermal-rating.html): Find the maximum continuous current a cable can carry for specific installation methods.
- [Cable Pulling Tension](https://designcalculators.co.in/cablepulling.html): Calculate tension and sidewall pressure to prevent cable damage during installation.
- [Comm Cable Loss](https://designcalculators.co.in/comm-cable-loss.html): Estimate signal attenuation (dB loss) in communication and data cables over distance.
- [Conduit Fill Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/conduit-fill.html): Ensure NEC/IEC compliance by calculating cable occupancy percentages in conduits.
- [CT Saturation](https://designcalculators.co.in/ctsaturation.html): Check if Current Transformers will saturate under fault conditions to ensure relay operation.
- [Earth Conductor Size](https://designcalculators.co.in/earth-conductor-size.html): Sizing protective earth conductors to withstand adiabatic heating during faults.
- [Earthing Fault Simulator](https://designcalculators.co.in/earthingfaultsimulator.html): Visualize potential rise and fault current items in various earthing system types (TN, TT,
                            IT).
- [Equipment Relay Setting](https://designcalculators.co.in/equipment-relay.html): Calculate pickup current and time dial settings for overcurrent protection relays.
- [Grounding System Design](https://designcalculators.co.in/grounding.html): Design substation grounding grids for safe Step and Touch potentials (IEEE 80).
- [Harmonic Distortion](https://designcalculators.co.in/harmonic-distortion.html): Calculate Total Harmonic Distortion (THD) and evaluate impact on power quality.
- [Harmonics Analyser](https://designcalculators.co.in/harmonicsanalyser.html): Analyze individual harmonic orders and their contribution to system heating and losses.
- [HVAC Sizing Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/hvac-sizing.html): Estimate heat load and cooling capacity requried for electrical rooms/substations.
- [LC Resonance Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/lcresonancecalculator.html): Determine resonant frequency of Inductor-Capacitor circuits.
- [Lighting Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/lighting-calulator.html): Calculate number of fixtures required to achieve desired Lux levels (Lumen method).
- [Maintenance Guide](https://designcalculators.co.in/maintenance-guide.html): Checklist and schedules for preventative maintenance of electrical transformers and panels.
- [Motor Efficiency](https://designcalculators.co.in/motor-efficiency.html): Compute electrical-to-mechanical energy conversion efficiency and loss analysis.
- [Motor Starting Current](https://designcalculators.co.in/motor-starting.html): Analyze voltage dip and inrush current during DOL, Star-Delta, or Soft Start methods.
- [Neutral Earth Fault](https://designcalculators.co.in/neutral-earth-fault-current.html): Calculate earth fault current magnitude based on system impedance and grounding method.
- [Power Factor Correction](https://designcalculators.co.in/power-factor.html): Size capacitor banks (kVAR) to improve power factor and avoid utility penalties.
- [Protection Device](https://designcalculators.co.in/protection-device.html): Select fuses and protection relays based on load characteristics and discrimination.
- [Relay Coordination](https://designcalculators.co.in/relay-coordination.html): Plot and analyze time-current curves (TCC) for selective coordination.
- [Short Circuit Current](https://designcalculators.co.in/short-circuit.html): Calculate 3-phase, Line-to-Line, and Line-to-Ground fault currents (IEC 60909).
- [Skin Depth Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/skindepth.html): Determine effective conductor area and resistance increase at high frequencies.
- [Solar PV Array](https://designcalculators.co.in/solarpvarray.html): Size PV strings and arrays based on inverter voltage windows and temperature coefficients.
- [Symmetrical Components](https://designcalculators.co.in/symmetricalcomponents.html): Decompose unbalanced 3-phase phasors into Positive, Negative, and Zero sequence components.
- [System X/R Ratio](https://designcalculators.co.in/systemxrcalculator.html): Calculate system reactance-to-resistance ratio for determining breaker interrupting duties.
- [Transformer Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/transformer-calculator.html): Determine full load current, kVA rating, and turns ratio for power transformers.
- [Transformer Inrush](https://designcalculators.co.in/transformerinrush.html): Estimate magnetizing inrush current magnitude for protection setting stability.
- [Transmission Line](https://designcalculators.co.in/transmissionline.html): Calculate ABCD parameters, voltage regulation, and efficiency of long power lines.
- [Unit Converter](https://designcalculators.co.in/unit-converter.html): Instant conversion for electrical units: Power, Energy, Current, Voltage, and more.
- [UPS Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/ups-sizing.html): Size Uninterruptible Power Supply (kW/kVA) to support critical loads with safety margins.
- [VFD Selection Tool](https://designcalculators.co.in/vfd-selection.html): Select Variable Frequency Drives based on motor power, voltage, and application type.
- [Voltage Drop Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/voltage-drop.html): Calculate voltage drop percentage in cables to ensure equipment terminal voltage compliance.
- [Generator Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/generatorsizing.html): Estimate diesel generator (DG) capacity requried for starting motors and static loads.
- [Industrial Lighting](https://designcalculators.co.in/industriallighting.html): Design warehouse and plant lighting layouts for optimal illumination and uniformity.
- [Logic Gates Simulator](https://designcalculators.co.in/logicgate.html): Interactive truth table and logic simulation for AND, OR, NOT, NAND, and NOR gates.
- [NEMA to IP Converter](https://designcalculators.co.in/nemaipconvertor.html): Convert between NEMA enclosure ratings and IEC Ingress Protection (IP) codes.
- [PCB Trace Width](https://designcalculators.co.in/pcbtrace.html): Calculate required trace width for printed circuit boards to handle current without
                            overheating.
- [Resistor Color Code](https://designcalculators.co.in/resistor.html): Decode 4, 5, and 6-band resistor color codes into resistance values instantly.
- [Solar Cable Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/solarcable.html): Specialize DC cable sizing for PV systems accounting for losses and environmental factors.
- [Residential Load Calc](https://designcalculators.co.in/electricalresidentialload.html): Calculate total electrical load for residential properties based on NEC standards.
- [Insulation Resistance](https://designcalculators.co.in/insulationresistance.html): Determine IR values for cables and motors to ensure safe operation.
- [Power Triangle](https://designcalculators.co.in/powertriangletool.html): Calculate kW, kVA, kVAR and Power Factor relationships instantly.

## Instrumentation & Control
- [ADC Resolution](https://designcalculators.co.in/adc-resolution.html): Calculate the smallest detectable voltage change (Step Size) for Analog-to-Digital
                            Converters.
- [Baud Rate Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/baud-rate.html): Determine bit duration and maximum cable length for RS-485/Modbus serial communications.
- [Capacitance Level](https://designcalculators.co.in/capacitance-level.html): Calculate level measurement based on probe capacitance change in conductive/non-conductive
                            fluids.
- [Cv/Kv Valve Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/cv-kv-valve.html): Calculate ISA 75.01 Flow Coefficients (Cv/Kv) for correct control valve selection.
- [DP Flow Conversion](https://designcalculators.co.in/dp-flow-conversion.html): Convert Differential Pressure readings (mmWC) directly to Volumetric Flow Rate (mÂ³/hr).
- [DP Level Measurement](https://designcalculators.co.in/dp-level.html): Calibrate Differential Pressure transmitters for open or closed tanks (URV/LRV).
- [HART Devices](https://designcalculators.co.in/hartdevices.html): Understand potential voltage drop and resistance requirements for HART communication loops.
- [Hydrostatic Level](https://designcalculators.co.in/hydrostatic-level.html): Calculate liquid level height based on pressure at the bottom of the tank and specific
                            gravity.
- [Impulse Pressure Drop](https://designcalculators.co.in/impulse-pressure-drop.html): Estimate signal delay and attenuation in pneumatic impulse lines to transmitters.
- [Instrument Range](https://designcalculators.co.in/instrument-range.html): Determine the Span, Range, and Turndown Ratio for various process instruments.
- [Intrinsic Safety Loop](https://designcalculators.co.in/intrinsic-safety.html): Verify I.S. barrier compatibility by matching Vmax, Imax, Ci, and Li parameters.
- [Junction Box Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/junctionbox.html): Calculate required dimensions for junction boxes based on terminal block count and spacing.
- [Loop Impedance](https://designcalculators.co.in/loop-impedance.html): Check if your power supply driving your 4-20mA current loop can support the total resistance.
- [Measurement Uncertainty](https://designcalculators.co.in/measurement.html): Estimate total system accuracy using RSS (Root Sum Square) of individual component errors.
- [Orifice Flow Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/orifice-flow.html): Calculate flow rate through an orifice plate given the pressure differential (ISO 5167).
- [Orifice Plate Beta](https://designcalculators.co.in/orifice-plate.html): Determine the Beta Ratio (d/D) required to generate a specific differential pressure.
- [pH Temp Compensation](https://designcalculators.co.in/ph-temp-comp.html): Correct pH readings for temperature variations using the Nernst Equation slope factor.
- [PID Symbol Library](https://designcalculators.co.in/pid-symbol-library.html): Quick reference for standard ISA 5.1 P&ID symbols for instruments and valves.
- [PID Tuning](https://designcalculators.co.in/pid-tuning.html): Interactive tool to simulate P, I, and D parameters and visualize process response.
- [Power Supply Load](https://designcalculators.co.in/power-supply-load.html): Calculate total current draw for a cabinet of 24VDC instruments to size the power supply.
- [Profibus Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/profibus.html): Calculate segment length and termination requirements for Profibus DP/PA networks.
- [RTD Lead Wire Comp.](https://designcalculators.co.in/rtd-lead-comp.html): Calculate error introduced by lead wire resistance in 2-wire vs 3-wire RTD circuits.
- [RTD/TC Conversion](https://designcalculators.co.in/rtd-tc-conversion.html): Convert resistance (Ohms) to Temperature (Â°C) for PT100 and mV to Â°C for Thermocouples.
- [Signal Scaling](https://designcalculators.co.in/signal-scaling.html): Map Process Variables (PV) to raw values (4-20mA, 0-10V, or PLC Counts).
- [SIL Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/sil.html): Reliability calculation for Safety Integrity Levels (PFDavg) for 1oo1 and 1oo2 architectures.
- [SNR Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/snr-calculator.html): Calculate Signal-to-Noise Ratio to evaluate signal quality in noisy environments.
- [Thermowell Wake](https://designcalculators.co.in/thermowell-wake.html): ASME PTC 19.3 TW-2016 calculation to check if thermowell passes wake frequency limits.
- [Turndown Ratio](https://designcalculators.co.in/turndown.html): Calculate the effective operating range of a flow meter relative to its maximum capacity.
- [Valve Cv Viewer](https://designcalculators.co.in/valve-cv.html): Quick lookup and sizing for standard valve Cv values based on pipe size and type.
- [Capillary Error](https://designcalculators.co.in/capillarylengthtemperatureerror.html): Estimate error in diaphragm seal systems due to ambient temperature changes on capillaries.
- [Valve Authority](https://designcalculators.co.in/controlvalveauthority.html): Calculate authority (dP_valve / dP_system) to ensure good control loop linearity.
- [Control Valve Noise](https://designcalculators.co.in/controlvalvenoise.html): Predict aerodynamic noise levels (dBA) generated by high pressure drop gas valves.
- [Flow Distortion](https://designcalculators.co.in/flowprofiledistortioncalculator.html): Estimate required straight pipe runs upstream/downstream to avoid flow profile errors.
- [Compressibility (Z)](https://designcalculators.co.in/gascompressibility.html): Calculate the Z-factor for natural gas to correct flow measurements for non-ideal behavior.
- [Impulse Freezing](https://designcalculators.co.in/impulselinefreezing.html): Check if impulse lines are at risk of freezing based on ambient temp and insulation.
- [PRV Sizing (API 520)](https://designcalculators.co.in/pressurereliefvalve.html): Size pressure relief valves for gas, steam, or liquid relief scenarios.
- [Tx Overrange](https://designcalculators.co.in/pressuretransmitteroverrange.html): Verify if pressure spikes or water hammer will damage your pressure transmitter sensor.
- [Relief Orifice Area](https://designcalculators.co.in/prvsizing.html): Calculate the effective discharge area required for a safety valve.
- [Reynolds Number](https://designcalculators.co.in/reynoldsnumbercal.html): Determine flow regime (Laminar vs Turbulent) for accurate flow metering correction.
- [RTD Excitation](https://designcalculators.co.in/rtdexcitationcurrentselection.html): Select optimal excitation current to minimize self-heating while maximizing signal.
- [RTD Self-Heating](https://designcalculators.co.in/rtdselfheating.html): Calculate temperature error caused by IÂ²R power dissipation in the sensor element.
- [Seal Fluid Shift](https://designcalculators.co.in/sealfluidzeroshift.html): Calculate zero shift in DP level transmitters due to fill fluid density changes.
- [Static Head](https://designcalculators.co.in/staticheadcal.html): Calculate pressure exerted by a column of liquid height in piping or vessels.
- [Steam Flow](https://designcalculators.co.in/steamflow.html): Compute mass flow rate of saturated or superheated steam given pressure and temperature.
- [Temp Sensor Lag](https://designcalculators.co.in/temperaturesensorlag.html): Estimate the dynamic response error of thermal wells in changing process temps.
- [Response Time (Tau)](https://designcalculators.co.in/tempsensorresponse.html): Calculate the time constant (63.2% response) for temperature sensors.
- [Thermocouple CJC](https://designcalculators.co.in/thermocouplecjccalculator.html): Understand how Cold Junction Compensation adjusts for ambient temperature at terminals.
- [TC Extension Cable](https://designcalculators.co.in/thermocoupleextensioncable.html): Verify max length of thermocouple extension wire to avoid signal noise.
- [Thermowell Frequency](https://designcalculators.co.in/thermowellwakefreq.html): Detailed wake frequency analysis to prevent catastrophic thermowell failure.
- [Ultrasonic Level](https://designcalculators.co.in/ultrasoniclevel.html): Configure blocking distance and range for non-contact ultrasonic level sensors.
- [Valve Cavitation](https://designcalculators.co.in/valvecavitationcalculator.html): Predict cavitation damage potential using the Sigma index (Ïƒ) and pressure drops.
- [Vibration Tx](https://designcalculators.co.in/vibrationtransmitter.html): Scale 4-20mA signals for Velocity (mm/s) or Acceleration (g) vibration sensors.
- [Wet Leg Compensation](https://designcalculators.co.in/wetlegdensitycompensation.html): Correct level readings for density variations in the reference wet leg.
- [Zone Classification](https://designcalculators.co.in/zoneclassificationhelper.html): Determine Hazardous Area Zones (0, 1, 2) based on release grade and ventilation.
- [PLC Scan Time](https://designcalculators.co.in/plcscantime.html): Estimate impact of logic size and I/O count on total PLC cycle time.
- [Valve Leakage Class](https://designcalculators.co.in/controlvalveleakage.html): Determine allowable leakage rates for control valves per ANSI/FCI 70-2 standards.
- [dB Gain/Loss Calc](https://designcalculators.co.in/dbcalculator.html): Calculate signal ratios in decibels for amplifiers, antennas, and sound.
- [WirelessHART Range](https://designcalculators.co.in/wirelesshart.html): Estimate signal range and network planning for WirelessHART field devices.

## Mechanical Engineering
- [Air Flow Duct Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/air-flow-duct.html): Calculate duct dimensions and friction losses for HVAC systems using the Equal Friction
                            method.
- [Allowable Stress](https://designcalculators.co.in/allowable-stress-safety-factor.html): Determine the maximum safe working stress based on material yield strength and Factor of
                            Safety.
- [ASME Vessel Design](https://designcalculators.co.in/asme-vessel.html): Calculate required shell and head thickness for pressure vessels per ASME Section VIII Div 1.
- [Beam Deflection](https://designcalculators.co.in/beam-deflection.html): Compute slope and deflection for simply supported, cantilever, and fixed beams under various
                            loads.
- [Bearing Life Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/bearinglife.html): Estimate the L10 rating life of ball and roller bearings based on dynamic load ratings.
- [Belt & Pulley](https://designcalculators.co.in/belt-pulley.html): Calculate belt length, speed ratio, and center distance for power transmission systems.
- [Bernoulli Equation](https://designcalculators.co.in/bernoulli-equation.html): Analyze fluid dynamics conservation of energy across two points in a streamline.
- [Boiler Efficiency](https://designcalculators.co.in/boiler-efficiency.html): Calculate thermal efficiency using the Direct Method (Input-Output) for steam boilers.
- [Bolt Torque](https://designcalculators.co.in/bolt-torque.html): Determine the required tightening torque to achieve desired preload tension in bolts.
- [Chiller Capacity](https://designcalculators.co.in/chiller-capacity.html): Calculate the cooling capacity (TR) required based on flow rate and temperature differential.
- [Compressor Power](https://designcalculators.co.in/compressor-power.html): Estimate brake horsepower (BHP) required for adiabatic compression of gases.
- [Heat Transfer Modes](https://designcalculators.co.in/conduction-convection-radiation.html): Solve fundamental heat transfer problems for conduction, convection, and radiation.
- [Cooling Tower Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/cooling-tower-sizing.html): Determine evaporation loss, cycles of concentration, and makeup water requirements.
- [Corrosion Rate](https://designcalculators.co.in/corrosion-rate.html): Calculate metal loss rate (mpy) based on weight loss over time for material selection.
- [Darcy-Weisbach](https://designcalculators.co.in/darcy-weisbach.html): Calculate major head loss due to friction in pipes for incompressible fluid flow.
- [Fan Laws](https://designcalculators.co.in/fan-laws.html): Predict changes in fan speed, volume, pressure, and power using affinity laws.
- [Fatigue Analysis](https://designcalculators.co.in/fatigue.html): Assess endurance limits and cyclic loading life using the Soderberg or Goodman criteria.
- [Finned Tube Heat](https://designcalculators.co.in/finned-tube-heat-transfer.html): Calculate enhanced heat transfer coefficients for extended surface (finned) tubes.
- [Fuel Combustion](https://designcalculators.co.in/fuel-combustion.html): Determine stoichiometric air-fuel ratios and excess air requirements for combustion.
- [Furnace Heat Duty](https://designcalculators.co.in/furnace-heat-duty.html): Calculate useful heat output and efficiency for industrial furnaces.
- [Gas Laws](https://designcalculators.co.in/gas-laws.html): Compute pressure, volume, and temperature relationships using Ideal and Combined Gas Laws.
- [Gas Properties](https://designcalculators.co.in/gas.html): Lookup properties like density and specific heat for common industrial gases.
- [Gear Design](https://designcalculators.co.in/gear-design.html): Calculate gear module, pitch diameter, and contact ratio for spur gears.
- [Heat Exchanger](https://designcalculators.co.in/heat-exchanger.html): Calculate LMTD (Log Mean Temperature Difference) and heat duty for Shell & Tube exchangers.
- [Heat Loss Pipes](https://designcalculators.co.in/heat-loss-pipes.html): Estimate thermal energy loss through insulated or uninsulated piping.
- [Jacketed Vessel](https://designcalculators.co.in/jacketed-vessel-heat-transfer.html): Calculate time required to heat or cool liquids in a jacketed reactor vessel.
- [Material Compatibility](https://designcalculators.co.in/material-compatibility.html): Check chemical resistance of piping materials and elastomers against aggressive fluids.
- [Nozzle Reinforcement](https://designcalculators.co.in/nozzle-reinforcement.html): Verify area replacement for openings in pressure vessel shells per ASME code.
- [Overall Heat Transfer](https://designcalculators.co.in/overall-heat-transfer.html): Calculate the U-value coefficient combining conduction and convection resistances.
- [Pipe Flow Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/pipe-flow.html): Comprehensive flow analysis: Velocity, Flow Rate, and Pressure Drop in process piping.
- [Pipe Stress](https://designcalculators.co.in/pipe-stress-flexibility.html): Basic check for thermal expansion stress and flexibility in piping loops.
- [Pump Head](https://designcalculators.co.in/pump-head.html): Calculate Total Dynamic Head (TDH) summing static lift and friction losses.
- [Pump Power](https://designcalculators.co.in/pump-power.html): Calculate hydraulic and brake horsepower (BHP) required to drive a pump.
- [Reynolds Number](https://designcalculators.co.in/reynolds-number.html): Identify flow regime (Laminar/Turbulent) essential for friction factor calculations.
- [Shaft Power & Torque](https://designcalculators.co.in/shaft-power-torque.html): Relate rotational speed (RPM), torque, and power for mechanical shafts.
- [Specific Heat](https://designcalculators.co.in/specific-heat-enthalpy.html): Calculate heat energy (q = mcÎ”T) required to raise the temperature of a substance.
- [Spring Design](https://designcalculators.co.in/spring.html): Calculate spring rate, load, and deflection for helical compression springs.
- [Steam Table](https://designcalculators.co.in/steam-table.html): Lookup properties of saturated and superheated steam (Enthalpy, Entropy, Volume).
- [Storage Tank Volume](https://designcalculators.co.in/storage-tank-volume.html): Calculate capacity of vertical, horizontal, and rectangular tanks including liquid heel.
- [Thermal Expansion](https://designcalculators.co.in/thermal-expansion.html): Calculate linear expansion of pipes and beams due to temperature changes.
- [Vibration Analysis](https://designcalculators.co.in/vibrationanalysis.html): Calculate frequency, displacement, velocity, and acceleration conversions.
- [Welding Stress](https://designcalculators.co.in/weldingstress.html): Estimate stress in fillet and butt welds under tensile and shear loads.
- [Air Compressor FAD](https://designcalculators.co.in/aircompressorfad.html): Convert compressor capacity to Free Air Delivery (FAD) conditions.
- [Control Valve Actuator](https://designcalculators.co.in/controlvalveactuator.html): Calculate thrust and torque required to seat/unseat valves against differential pressure.
- [Foundation Design](https://designcalculators.co.in/foundation.html): Estimate block foundation weight required for rotating machinery stability.
- [Hardness Converter](https://designcalculators.co.in/hardness.html): Convert metal hardness values between Rockwell, Brinell, and Vickers scales.
- [Hydraulic Cylinder](https://designcalculators.co.in/hydroliccylinder.html): Calculate force, speed, and fluid requirement for hydraulic actuators.
- [Machining Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/machining.html): Determine cutting speeds, feeds, and machining time for turning/milling.
- [Metal Weight Calculator](https://designcalculators.co.in/metalweight.html): Prepare BoQ by calculating weight of plates, bars, and pipes of various metals.
- [Moment of Inertia](https://designcalculators.co.in/momentofinertia.html): Calculate Area Moment of Inertia (I) for common structural cross-sections.
- [Open Channel Flow](https://designcalculators.co.in/openchannelflow.html): Use Manning's Equation to calculate flow rate in open channels and weirs.
- [O-Ring Sizing](https://designcalculators.co.in/oring.html): Select correct O-ring dimensions and groove sizing for static seal applications.
- [Psychrometric Calc](https://designcalculators.co.in/psychrometric.html): Determine humidity ratio, dew point, and enthalpy of moist air.
- [Darcy Friction Factor](https://designcalculators.co.in/frictionfactortool.html): Calculate the friction factor for pipe flow using the Colebrook-White equation.
- [NPT/BSP Threads](https://designcalculators.co.in/nptbspthreadcalculator.html): Lookup chart and dimensions for NPT and BSP pipe threads.
- [Pipe Schedule & Stress](https://designcalculators.co.in/pipescheduletool.html): Detailed pipe dimensions (ID, OD, Wall Thickness) and stress ratings.

## Technical Implementation
- **Stack**: Static HTML5/CSS3/JS.
- **Math Engine**: MathJax (LaTeX) for formula rendering.
- **Data Viz**: Chart.js for interactive sensitivity analysis.
- **Authority**: Expert-curated by Anil Sharma (28+ years experience).
